questions.q: According to a study featured in Scientific American on April 30, 2026, researchers were surprised to find that city birds appear to be more afraid of whom?
The Toronto Blue Jays dropped which organization from a promotional day following a Fifth Estate investigation into corruption allegations?
For the first time in nearly two decades, Russia's 2026 Victory Day parade in Red Square will be held without what?
According to a 2026 FAO report, which province recorded the largest unemployment rate increase in Canada for the second year running?
An MIT study published on April 30, 2026, revealed that a 10% increase in female immigrants in a given U.S. metro area leads to registered nurses spending more time doing what?
Who playfully reminded U.S. President Donald Trump that he is Canada's head of state during a White House state dinner?
A 6-3 Supreme Court decision in April 2026 limited the Voting Rights Act by striking down a congressional map from which state as an unconstitutional racial gerrymander?
In late April 2026, prosecutors alleged that singer D4vd fatally stabbed 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez for what reason?
options: To silence her from exposing their relationship
To steal her unreleased songwriting materials
To stop her from testifying in a fraud case
To cover up a hit-and-run accident
questions.correctText: To silence her from exposing their relationship
